message:
🐛 Merge Plant/Plants into single category (#10)

Add PRODUCT_TYPE_ALIASES to normalize synonymous product types:
- PLANT → PLANTS (131 + 4 products merged)
- LIVE PLANT → LIVE PLANTS → PLANTS

Applied in groupProductsByType(), extractFacets(), and applyFilters()
so collections page, filter sidebar, and category filtering all
treat them as one group.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
